title: windroot: observation-driven solar-wind source-region finder
description: windroot fuses magnetic connectivity (PFSS + ballistic back-mapping) with spectroscopic outflow evidence (SPICE / Hinode EIS Doppler maps) to identify and rank solar-wind source regions on the Sun. Existing tools rely on magnetic geometry alone; windroot adds the missing observation-driven evidence layer. Includes a multi-dataset backtest suite (synthetic recovery, sunkit-magex cross-validation, and end-to-end on a real GONG CR 2234 synoptic magnetogram).
